headline: Regions Bank Appoints Christina Clemmons as Texas Consumer Banking Executive
summary: DALLAS, May 05, 2026--Experience. Results. Longtime banking leader Christina Clemmons is joining Regions Bank as the company further strengthens its foundation in Texas.
